etymology.description: 中(中) (zhōng, "middle") refers to central or middle, often alluding to the idea of China being the 'Middle Kingdom'. 醫(醫) (yī, "medicine") refers to the practice or profession concerned with maintaining health and treating diseases.
etymology.interpretation: 中(中) (zhōng, "middle") suggests the central or original place where this medical practice originated, implying its association with China. 醫(醫) (yī, "medicine") directly denotes the practice of medicine. Together, 中醫(中醫) (zhōngyī, "Chinese medicine") refers specifically to the traditional practices and methodologies of medicine developed in China.

examples.chinese: 中医(中醫)注重整体观念(注重整體觀念)。
examples.english: Chinese medicine emphasizes a holistic approach.

examples.chinese: 很多人都相信中医(很多人都相信中醫)，因为它有几千年的历史(因為它有幾千年的歷史)。
examples.pinyin: Hěnduō rén dōu xiāngxìn zhōngyī, yīnwèi tā yǒu jǐ qiān nián de lìshǐ.
examples.english: Many people trust Chinese medicine because it has thousands of years of history.

examples.chinese: 她在学习中医(她在學習中醫)，希望帮助更多人(希望幫助更多人)。
examples.pinyin: Tā zài xuéxí zhōngyī, xīwàng bāngzhù gèng duō rén.
examples.english: She is studying Chinese medicine, hoping to help more people.
